---
title: "bayes_mixed_eff"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(brms)
library(bayesplot)
library(tidybayes)
library(readr)


dat <- shock_acuity_metrics_copy <- read_csv("shock_acuity_metrics copy.csv")


dat <- dat %>%
  rename(
    id = "Participant",
    cond_name = "Condition",
    cond = "ConditionPercent",
    head_acc = "ProximalHighG2",
    leg_acc = "DistalHighG2",
    gap_size = "VisualAcuityPixels"
  ) 
```

```{r}
summary(dat)
```

```{r}
dat$leg_acc_z <- scale(dat$leg_acc)

priors <- c(
  prior(normal(0, 1), class = "b"),
  prior(normal(5.5, 2), class = "Intercept"),
  prior(exponential(1), class = "sd"),
  prior(exponential(1), class = "sigma")
)

fit_prior <- brm(
  gap_size ~ leg_acc_z + (leg_acc_z | id),
  data = dat,
  prior = priors,
  sample_prior = "only"
)

pp_check(fit_prior)
```

```{r}

fit <- brm(
  formula = gap_size ~ leg_acc_z + (leg_acc_z | id),
  data = dat,
  family = gaussian,
  prior = priors,
  chains = 4,
  iter = 4000,
  warmup = 1000,
  cores = 4,
  seed = 123,
)

summary(fit)


plot(fit)

pp_check(fit)

#get_prior(fit)
```

```{r}
posterior <- as_draws_df(fit)
slope_samples <- posterior$b_leg_acc_z
mean(slope_samples)

plot(density(slope_samples),
     main = "Posterior of slope (leg_acc)",
     xlab = "Slope")


slope_df <- data.frame(slope = slope_samples)

ci <- quantile(slope_samples, c(0.025, 0.975))

ci

ggplot(slope_df, aes(x = slope)) +
  geom_density(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = ci[1], linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = ci[2], linetype = "dotted") +
  labs(
    title = "Posterior Distribution of Slope",
    x = "Slope",
    y = "Density"
  )


prior_draws <- as_draws_df(fit_prior)
prior_slope <- prior_draws$b_leg_acc_z

# approximating likelihood
mle_fit <- lm(gap_size ~ leg_acc_z, data = dat)
mle_mean <- coef(mle_fit)["leg_acc_z"]
mle_se   <- summary(mle_fit)$coefficients["leg_acc_z", "Std. Error"]

xgrid <- seq(-3, 3, length.out = 500)
df_l <- data.frame(
  x = xgrid,
  likelihood_dens = dnorm(xgrid, mean = mle_mean, sd = mle_se))


#df_l$likelihood_dens <- dnorm(df_l$x, mean = 0.1, sd = 0.34)



ggplot() +
  geom_density(aes(prior_slope, color = "Prior"), fill = "lightgreen", alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_area(data = df_l, aes(x = x, y = likelihood_dens, color = "Likelihood"), 
            alpha = 0.2, fill = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_density(aes(slope_samples, color = "Posterior"), fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(x = "Regression Slope", y = "Density (scaled)", title = "Prior, Likelihood (approx.), and Posterior Distributions", color = "") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Prior" = "green", "Likelihood" = "red", "Posterior" = "steelblue")) +
  theme_classic()


      
```

```{r}
leg_acc_mean <- mean(dat$leg_acc, na.rm = TRUE)
leg_acc_sd   <- sd(dat$leg_acc, na.rm = TRUE)


newdat <- data.frame(
  leg_acc_raw = seq(min(dat$leg_acc), max(dat$leg_acc), length.out = 100)
)
newdat$leg_acc_z <- (newdat$leg_acc_raw - leg_acc_mean) / leg_acc_sd
pop_fit <- fitted(fit, newdata = newdat, re_formula = NA)
pop_df <- cbind(newdat, as.data.frame(pop_fit))


grid <- expand.grid(
  leg_acc_raw = seq(min(dat$leg_acc), max(dat$leg_acc), length.out = 100),
  id = unique(dat$id)
)
grid$leg_acc_z <- (grid$leg_acc_raw - leg_acc_mean) / leg_acc_sd
sub_fit <- fitted(fit, newdata = grid, re_formula = NULL)
grid_results <- cbind(grid, as.data.frame(sub_fit))

```

```{r}
ggplot() +

  # raw data
  geom_point(
    data = dat,
    aes(x = leg_acc, y = gap_size, color = "Observed data"),
    alpha = 0.4, size = 1.6
  ) +

  # subject-specific lines
  geom_line(
    data = grid_results,
    aes(x = leg_acc_raw, y = Estimate, group = id, color = "Subject fits"),
    alpha = 0.25
  ) +

  # population CI ribbon 
  geom_ribbon(
    data = pop_df,
    aes(x = leg_acc_raw, ymin = Q2.5, ymax = Q97.5),
    fill = "steelblue",
    alpha = 0.2,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +

  # population mean line
  geom_line(
    data = pop_df,
    aes(x = leg_acc_raw, y = Estimate, color = "Group mean"),
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +

  # manual color + legend control
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Legend",
    values = c(
      "Observed data" = "black",
      "Subject fits" = "gray60",
      "Group mean" = "steelblue4"
    )
  ) +

  labs(
    title = "Tibial Acceleration vs Landolt Ring Gap Size",
    x = expression(Tibial~Acceleration~(g^2)),
    y = "Landolt Ring Gap Size (Pixels)"
  ) +

  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +

  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```

```{r}
pp_check(fit)
```
